{{MirageTest
|relic=Africa Star
|affct=ART
|name=Stars of Earth
|rank=SSS
|reward=W-tads +1k
|1name=Oz Star
|1rec=2.47M
|1atk=43,953
|1def=29,119
|1hp=665,918
|1weak=12,235
|2name=Yurope Star
|2rec=4.49M
|2atk=63,823
|2def=53,283
|2hp=1,237,879
|2weak=15,251
|3name=Murikan Star
|3rec=7.81M
|3atk=88,448
|3def=58,597
|3hp=2,261,991
|3weak=18,241
|4name=
|4rec=
|4atk=
|4def=
|4hp=
|4weak=
|5rec=
|5atk=
|5def=
|5hp=
|5weak=
}}
